system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike and Medicine Skill
Type: Counter
Qi: 3

When someone strikes at you with a melee weapon or unarmed, you grab their limb and deliver a devastating series of taps that render them helpless. When anyone strikes at you with a melee weapon, leg strike, throw, grapple or arm strike, you may use this counter (does not work against Kung Fu Techniques). Roll Arm Strike against your attacker’s Attack roll. On a Success you avoid the attack and grab one of their limbs. You may now attempt a Medicine Skill roll TN 6. On a Success the person is immobile for 1 round per Rank of Dianxue. This is a lost Technique known only to the Phoenix clan. They have vanished and according to rumor it is still found in one of their old manuals. Cathartic: This can be used against Kung Fu Techniques as well. In addition the person is immobile for 2 rounds per Rank of Dianxue.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: After successful Medicine TN 6 follow-up, target is immobile for 1 round per Rank of Dianxue
system.catharticTargetEffects: Can counter Kung Fu Techniques; after successful Medicine TN 6 follow-up, target is immobile for 2 rounds per Rank of Dianxue
system.accessNotes: This is a lost Technique known only to the Phoenix clan. They have vanished and according to rumor it is still found in one of their old manuals.
system.catharticEffect: This can be used against Kung Fu Techniques as well. In addition the person is immobile for 2 rounds per Rank of Dianxue.
